subject: A curated opportunity for Salon by the Sea
body:
Salon by the Sea's new Palm Beach wellness floor signals a clientele perfectly suited to MaRe's luxury head spa system. MaRe Eye, our trichologist-developed scalp diagnostic, lifts retail conversion from the industry-standard 3% to 40%+ by tying every Philip Martin's recommendation to real scalp data. We partner exclusively with salons that match our standard — I'd like to explore whether yours does.
— Rebecca

subject: A curated opportunity for Atelier Nord
body:
Atelier Nord's inclusion in New York Magazine's top five hair houses signals a commitment to luxury that aligns with MaRe. MaRe Eye, our trichologist-developed scalp diagnostic, lifts retail conversion from the industry-standard 3% to 40%+ by informing bespoke Philip Martin's protocols. We partner exclusively with salons that match our standard — I'd like to explore whether yours does.
— Rebecca

subject: A curated opportunity for The Canyon Spa
body:
The Canyon Spa's seasonal concentration of HNW clientele at a Leading Hotels of the World property aligns with MaRe's focus. MaRe Eye, our trichologist-developed scalp diagnostic, lifts retail conversion from the industry-standard 3% to 40%+ by systematically informing Philip Martin's product recommendations. We partner exclusively with venues that match our standard — I'd like to explore whether yours does.
— Rebecca
